message:
test(labruntime): port 42 simulation tests to RuntimeFixture (ft-22x4r)

Port all 42 #[tokio::test] async tests from simulation.rs to asupersync
RuntimeFixture. Covers scenario execution, resize timelines, font atlas
policies, TutorialSandbox operations, and expectation checking.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
